title: staff — published macros
description: Two request-level macros that surface the resolved active staff from the RequestContext. Rare — only /me/staff routes load this. Also two Blueprint macros for shared column families across future staff-related tables.
namespace_note: Macros extend Illuminate\Http\Request. Middleware-set context bleeds through the Request accessor without needing to plumb it through service constructors.

macros.name: Request::activeStaff
macros.adds: A single accessor on the framework Request class that returns the resolved Staff model (or null when no staff context).
macros.description: Reads from RequestContext::staff() set by the /me/staff endpoints. Lazy-loads the model on first access.

macros.name: Request::activeStaffId
macros.adds: Convenience accessor returning just the ID.

blueprint_macros.name: Blueprint::staffTimestamps
blueprint_macros.adds: Adds the shared column family for staff-lifecycle-adjacent tables: started_at (date) + ended_at (date, nullable). Used by future staff_branches (Wave 3+ multi-branch pivot) + attendance::ShiftAssignment (Wave 4).

blueprint_macros.name: Blueprint::terminationFields
blueprint_macros.adds: Adds the termination-reason column family: termination_reason (enum, nullable) + termination_notes (text, nullable). Used by Staff + any future termination-tracking table.
